scripts.build:binary: bun run build:web && bun run scripts/build-binary.ts
scripts.native:build: bun run runtime:llama:build && bun run runtime:mlx:build
scripts.native:test: bun run cache:identity:check && bun run structured-output:gate && bun run memory:honesty:check && bun run native:structure:check && bun run native:ownership:check && bun run runtime:process:ownership && bun run native:cache:tier-a
scripts.native:cache:tier-a: bun run runtime:cache:test && bun run runtime:llama:test && bun run runtime:mlx:test && bun run native:probe:leak:check && bun run native:cache:gate:check
scripts.runtime:llama:test: cmake -S native/llama -B build/llama-test -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/llama-test --target clap-llama-tests && ctest --test-dir build/llama-test --output-on-failure
scripts.runtime:llama:physical:test: cmake -S native/llama -B build/llama-test -DBUILD_TESTING=ON && cmake --build build/llama-test --target clap-llama-cache-model-probe && build/llama-test/clap-llama-cache-model-probe
scripts.runtime:mlx:test: cargo build --release --locked -p clap-cache-ffi --manifest-path native/cache/Cargo.toml && swift test --package-path native/mlx
scripts.typecheck: bun run ensure:libexec && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: bun run ensure:libexec && bun test apps packages
